name: 吐槽型內心獨白（仙人視角）
description: 以千年仙人的視角吐槽凡間子孫的愚蠢行為，製造『上帝視角+黑色幽默』的獨特喜感。這類對白既推動劇情（揭露真相），又提供笑料，一箭雙鵰。

examples.drama_title: 💔Reborn! Family listened to my inner thoughts, scheming girl cry!#chinesedrama
examples.excerpt: This must be my silly, sweet-natured mom. / Silly Mom is quite pretty / She's just not very bright. / She lived with the fake heiress for so many years / She couldn't even see through her scheme. / No wonder the Xie family was wiped out.
